name: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp
business: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp is a special purpose acquisition company formed to effect a merger with one or more businesses, focusing on the critical minerals sector. It has not selected any business combination target and has no current operations.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus our search on companies that own, operate, or are developing assets in the critical minerals sector that are fundamental to the economic and national security interests of the United States.

Our primary investment focus includes: Critical Mineral Assets: Companies with assets or enabling technologies in key materials such as lithium, graphite, nickel, cobalt, copper, uranium, rare earth elements (REEs), vanadium, germanium, antimony, 3T technology metals (Tin, Tungsten, Tantalum), and more.

We expect to target companies involved in the exploration, processing, production, and domestic refining and recycling of minerals essential to national defense, clean energy independence, and technological leadership, preferably with enabling technologies.

We expect to target companies involved in the exploration, processing, production, and domestic refining and recycling of minerals essential to national defense, clean energy independence, and technological leadership, preferably with enabling technologies.

We intend to identify companies with critical resource infrastructure, in order to accelerate America s safe and secure energy future, accelerate electrification and grid expansion, support the what we expect to be an upcoming digital infrastructure revolution, reduce foreign reliance on mineral supply chains, and drive industrial resurgence.

We believe the world is entering a period of strategic resource realignment. The convergence of the energy transition, geopolitical shifts, and new industrial policies has created an urgent need for secure, reliable, and domestic supply chains for critical minerals.
